cloudscape_compliance.evidence: All imports use individual paths (@cloudscape-design/components/{name}), 0 barrel imports found. useCollection on all 13 Table-containing files. TopNavigation outside AppLayout in AppShell.tsx:141. All events use ({ detail }) destructuring pattern.

nextjs_conventions.evidence: 'use client' on 69 files with hooks/events/state. 0 Pages Router patterns (getServerSideProps etc). layout.tsx exports metadata as Server Component. Next.js 15 async params pattern used correctly in API routes.

typescript_quality.evidence: 0 'any' types found. 0 @ts-ignore/@ts-nocheck. 12 type definition files in src/types/. All interfaces properly defined with union types for enums. Strict mode compatible (build + type-check pass).

accessibility.evidence: enableKeyboardNavigation on all 14 Table instances. FormField wrapping all inputs in RefBookRegistrationModal. ariaLabel on TopNavigation notification button and RefBookTable delete button. Minor: explicit ariaLabel not set on Table components (header text used as fallback).

requirements_coverage.evidence: FR-001: NotamTable+bedrock.service+analyze API. FR-002: NotamRawAndParsed+qCode.service. FR-003: NotamAiAnalysis+impact-analysis API. FR-004: FlightNotamImpact+affected-flights API. FR-005: NotamTable(PropertyFilter)+stats API. FR-006: RouteImpactMap(Leaflet)+dashboard API. FR-007: FlightBriefingActions+generate API+bedrock. FR-008: generate-crew API. FR-009: RouteDeviationGuidance+alternatives API. FR-010: matching.service+APIs. FR-011: RefBookTable+RefBookRegistrationModal+CRUD API. FR-012: NotamRawAndParsed+NotamAiAnalysis. FR-013: FlightTable+FlightInfo. FR-014: shift-handover API. FR-015: summarize API+bedrock. FR-016: CriticalAlertBanner+AlertContext. FR-017: AuditLogTable+audit-log API. FR-018: NotamDiffView+diff API. FR-019: NotamExpiryIndicator+expiryStatus filter.

backend_quality.evidence: 31 API route files with proper HTTP methods. 8 zod validation schemas with safeParse on all POST/PUT routes. Standard error responses (400/404/500) with { error, message, statusCode }. Repository pattern in 9 files abstracting Map-based store. No business logic in route handlers. Real Bedrock integration in bedrock.service.ts with Q-Code fallback.

code_organization.evidence: Directory structure matches CLAUDE.md convention exactly. PascalCase components, camelCase hooks/utils, kebab-case API dirs. 0 barrel exports (index.ts re-exports). 1 default export per file. Frontend components access data only via hooks (SWR), never importing lib/db directly. No circular imports detected.

comment_language.evidence: All file headers in Korean. JSDoc descriptions in Korean with English tag names. Inline comments in Korean for intent explanation. @requirements tags reference FR IDs in English.

seed_data_consistency.evidence: 50 NOTAMs (NFR-007: >=50), 12 routes (>=10), 30 flights (>=30), 15 airports (>=15). All FK references valid: Flight.routeId->Route.id, Flight.airports->Airport.icaoCode, RefBookEntry.notamId->Notam.id, Briefing.flightId->Flight.id, Briefing.notamIds->Notam.id[], ImpactData.notamId/flightId/routeId all valid. All enum values within defined types. NOTAMR replacesNotamId references valid (notam-021->notam-001, notam-041->notam-005).

coverage.notes: FR-008, FR-014, FR-015, FR-018 are P1/P2 detail features tested indirectly. All P0 FRs have interaction tests.

fixes_applied: Row click + SplitPanel detection for NOTAM detail
Link/row click patterns for routes and briefings
Column header validation for audit log
Impact analysis selectors updated to match actual UI
Heading wait and timeout for parallel worker stability

issues.description: Table components lack explicit ariaLabel prop (Cloudscape auto-uses Header text as fallback)
issues.recommendation: Add ariaLabel prop to each Table component
Add @returns JSDoc tags to affected functions
